title: Dental Hygienist
description: CommonSpirit Health is seeking a Dental Hygienist to provide preventive oral healthcare services. You'll perform cleanings, take radiographs, and educate patients on oral health. Work remotely for a health system dedicated to making a visible difference in the lives of patients and communities served.
responsibilities: Perform prophylactic cleaning and scaling on patient teeth
Take and develop dental radiographs and intraoral images
Screen patients for oral cancer and other pathology
Apply protective agents like fluoride and sealants
Educate patients on proper oral hygiene and prevention

requirements.education: Associate's or Bachelor's degree in Dental Hygiene

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
